svg.text: Figure 4 candidate | Task-level value of activation under a fixed photon budget
Margins are measured against the task-specific linear no-activation baseline using the saved minimal benchmark outputs.
Line color denotes detector efficiency eta. Marker shape denotes the best implementable route at that setting.
Activation clearly worth paying for in 0/15 settings
Activation clearly worth paying for in 15/15 settings
Route preference map: sign of (on-off accuracy - homodyne accuracy)
Budget blocks are grouped by detector efficiency eta = 0.99, 0.70, 0.50 from left to right.
The best route switches with task geometry, eta, and budget.
Single-neuron closeness to the bound does not fix system-level preference.

All values are drawn from task_level_benchmark_summary.json generated by the saved minimal benchmark. Width labels above markers denote the selected hidden-layer width for the best implementable route.
